content: Components must be pure renderers — no direct API calls, no business logic. Data fetching lives in custom hooks, server state managed exclusively through TanStack Query, client UI state in Zustand stores.
Use Parameter Object Pattern for functions with more than one argument. Positional params only for trivial cases (e.g., clamp(value, min, max)). Use default values in destructured parameters.
Always use object destructuring when accessing object properties. Destructure function parameters when accessing multiple properties. Destructure in assignments, not just declarations.

Never use 'any' — use 'unknown' with type guards. All functions must have explicit return types. No inline type definitions. No magic strings — use literal unions or constants. Use 'import type' for type-only imports. Discriminated unions over boolean flags.

name: Frontend data flow
description: pages/ → hooks/ → api/ → backend REST/WS. pages/ → stores/. Components render only. hooks/ orchestrate api/, ws/, stores/. api/ contains REST client functions only. ws/ contains WebSocket client only. stores/ hold client-side UI state only (selected items, panel visibility), not server state.

name: vite-react-ts-bootstrap
description: Vite+React+TypeScript frontend: bun create vite --template react-ts, then bun add for all deps. tsconfig.app.json needs baseUrl and paths for @/ alias. verbatimModuleSyntax:true requires import type. Prettier lint script: prettier --check 'src/**/*.{ts,tsx}'. typecheck script: tsc --noEmit.

name: shadcn-manual-setup
description: shadcn/ui without CLI: install @radix-ui primitives individually, create components/ui/*.tsx manually using cva+cn(). tailwindcss@3 + tailwindcss-animate + CSS variables in index.css. components.json sets style:new-york, baseColor:zinc.

name: phase2-screen-structure
description: Projects/Dashboard/Settings screens: pages/ orchestrate via hooks, components/ are pure renderers. Projects: useProjects+useProjectStorage, inline detail panel drawer (not right-drawer), AlertDialog for delete. Dashboard: useSystemHealth for resource card, ProjectSelector combobox pattern. Settings: useSettings+useUpdateSettings+useTestAiConnection into SettingsForm. API: api/client.ts has fetchApi<T>+ApiError; per-resource files are thin wrappers. gitignore has 'projects/' so components/projects/ needs git add -f.

name: runs-observability-layout
description: Runs page uses tab-based layout (Timeline, Metrics, Logs, System, Checkpoints) with ActiveRunBanner at top when a run is active. useRunStream hook manages WebSocket state; liveLogs/liveMetrics/systemResources/liveCheckpoints passed to child components. REST fetching for stages/checkpoints driven by selectedRunId.

name: websocket-singleton-client
description: WebSocket client implemented as singleton class (RunWebSocketClient) exported as wsClient. Handles reconnection with exponential backoff (1s base, 30s cap), ping keepalive every 20s, and typed envelope dispatch. useRunStream hook subscribes to the singleton and invalidates TanStack Query cache on run state events.

name: config-yaml-edit-pattern
description: Training/Adapters pages load active config as YAML blob via GET /projects/{id}/configs/active, parse with js 'yaml' npm package, populate local state. On save, merge changes back into full WorkbenchConfig and stringify back to YAML for PUT /projects/{id}/configs. Requires 'yaml' pkg (added to package.json).

name: weights-explorer-layout
description: Weights and Architecture page uses 5-tab layout (Architecture, Parameters, Activations, Deltas, Expert Edit). Architecture tab: ModuleSearchInput + collapsible ArchitectureTree + LayerDetailDrawer dialog. Parameters tab: ParameterSummaryTable with trainable/frozen filter. Activations tab: ActivationSampleSelector (textarea) + ActivationLayerSelector (checkbox list) + ActivationSummaryView (histograms) + ActivationCheckpointCompare. Deltas tab: computed from comparing two snapshots via computeDeltas() — DeltaMagnitudeChart (recharts BarChart) + DeltaHeatmap (CSS grid) + BeforeAfterSummary. Expert tab: ExpertModeToggle + TensorEditor + CheckpointBackupNotice + RevertButton.

name: model-explorer-types-snake-case
description: ModelArchitectureResponse, LayerNode, ActivationSnapshotResponse, TierOneStats, ActivationLayerSnapshot use snake_case field names in TypeScript (e.g. model_id, architecture_name, total_parameters, layer_name, histogram_bins, created_at) to match backend responses since fetchApi does no camelCase conversion. UI-only types (WeightDelta, ParameterRow) use camelCase.

title: activation-delta-frontend-only
rationale: No backend delta endpoint exists. Weight deltas are computed on the frontend by comparing two ActivationSnapshotResponse objects — deltaMagnitude = abs(meanA - meanB) per layer. DeltaMagnitudeChart, DeltaHeatmap, BeforeAfterSummary all consume ReadonlyArray<WeightDelta> computed in the page.

name: datasets-page-structure
description: Datasets screen uses controlled form state (DatasetFormState) for resolve inputs, TanStack Query for profile/samples, mutation for resolve+preview. Profile only loads after first resolve; samples enabled only when profile exists. PreviewTransformResponse stored in local state since it's a mutation result not cached server state.

name: backend-snake-case-normalization
description: Backend dataset endpoints return snake_case (dataset_id, total_rows, split_counts, resolved_at). Frontend normalizes in api/datasets.ts via normalizeProfile() adapter function — keeps types camelCase throughout the rest of the frontend, converts only at the API boundary.

name: ai-suggestions-screen-structure
description: AI Suggestions screen uses two-panel layout (list left, detail right). API client (api/suggestions.ts) parses backend snake_case JSON (config_diff string, evidence_json string) into typed AISuggestion. SuggestionConfigDiff is Record<string, {current, suggested}> distinct from ConfigDiff. Components: SuggestionList, SuggestionDetail, ConfigDiffView, EvidenceList, suggestion-badges.

name: phase-6-ui-components
description: Compare screen: RunSelector (multi-select), ConfigDiffViewer (Monaco diff), MetricOverlayChart (recharts multi-line), MetricComparisonTable (final/min/trend per run), ArtifactComparisonPanel (checkpoint counts, sizes). Artifacts screen: ArtifactTable with run/type/size columns, TypeFilter/RunFilter dropdowns, ArtifactDetailDrawer for metadata, DownloadButton, DeleteButton, BulkCleanupButton, StorageSummary pie chart. Dashboard adds StoragePanel (total usage, breakdown, reclaimable bytes, cleanup action).

name: artifacts-screen-structure
description: Artifacts page uses filter bar (TypeFilter, RunFilter) + ArtifactTable + ArtifactDetailDrawer (Dialog) + StorageSummary sidebar. API clients in api/artifacts.ts and api/storage.ts normalize snake_case backend responses to camelCase. Hooks in useArtifacts.ts and useStorage.ts wrap TanStack Query. StoragePanel added to Dashboard grid.

name: compare-screen-structure
description: Compare screen uses top-level RunSelector for multi-run selection, Tabs layout (Metrics|Config Diff|Artifacts), useRunComparison hook fetches compare summary (fetchRunComparison) + time-series per run (useQueries fetchRunMetrics). ConfigDiffViewer uses Monaco DiffEditor for 2 runs or table fallback for 3+. MetricOverlayChart builds flat {step, runId1, runId2} data for Recharts multi-line. MetricComparisonTable uses summary from compare endpoint. ArtifactComparisonPanel shows checkpoint counts and sizes.

name: api-snake-to-camel-normalization
description: Backend returns snake_case JSON. Frontend types use camelCase. Normalization pattern: define RawXxx interface with snake_case fields, define public Xxx interface with camelCase fields, write normalizeXxx() function, call it inside fetchXxx(). See datasets.ts and runs.ts fetchRunComparison for examples.

name: api-normalization-pattern
description: All api/ files use Raw* interfaces for backend snake_case shape, then normalize() functions to camelCase TS types. fetchRuns extracts items from RawRunListResponse (backend returns paginated envelope). RunStage.logTail and Run.heartbeatPath are null (backend gap). Backend SettingsResponse uses ai_api_key_set (not is_ai_api_key_set). SystemHealthResponse uses model_loaded/cuda_available/mps_available (no is_ prefix). LogsResponse.lines normalized to logs. fetchModelArchitecture lives only in api/model-explorer.ts.

name: hooks-canonical-import-locations
description: hooks/ files import types (LogEntry, Checkpoint, MetricsParams, LogsParams) from @/types/run not @/api/runs. fetchHealth/fetchSystemHealth come from @/api/health. fetchProjectStorage comes from @/api/storage (not @/api/projects). fetchModelArchitecture comes from @/api/model-explorer (not @/api/models). wsClient.disconnect() must be called in useRunStream useEffect cleanup.

name: dashboard-new-components-pattern
description: CurrentModelCard accepts ModelProfile (snake_case: model_id, family, architecture_name), CurrentDatasetCard accepts DatasetProfile (camelCase after api normalization), RecentConfigChanges uses RawConfigVersionItem (snake_case direct from backend). Dashboard page uses inline useQuery with fetchApi for config versions list since hooks/useConfigs only exposes active config. ImportExportActions: export via Blob download, import via FileReader JSON parse + onImport callback.
Root .gitignore has 'projects/' entry for training data, which also blocks frontend/src/components/projects/.
resolution: Use 'git add -f' when adding files in frontend/src/components/projects/

name: settings-retention-components
description: DefaultRetentionPolicy uses Card + Input + Switch for CheckpointRetentionConfig fields (keepLastN, alwaysKeepBestEval, alwaysKeepFinal, deleteIntermediatesAfterCompletion). ExperimentRetentionDays uses Card + Input for numeric days. Both are controlled components with onChange + local state, wired into settings-page.tsx alongside SettingsForm. Backend settings schema excludes these fields — components are UI-only.

name: right-drawer-panel-pattern
description: RightDrawer renders panel components via a DrawerBody switch on rightDrawerContent. App store tracks drawerProjectId, drawerRunId, drawerLayerName, drawerSuggestionId for entity context. Typed DRAWER_LABELS keyed on Exclude<DrawerContent, null> enforces exhaustiveness. Each panel lives at components/layout/drawer-panels/<name>-panel.tsx.

name: sidebar-nav-groups
description: Sidebar collapsible nav groups use NavGroup interface (key, label, items), Collapsible from @radix-ui/react-collapsible via components/ui/collapsible.tsx, group expand/collapse state in app-store.ts navGroupExpanded persisted via zustand/middleware persist. Collapsed sidebar renders all items flat. ChevronRight icon rotated 90deg when open.

name: drawer-detail-panels
description: ProjectDetailPanel accepts { projectId } and uses useProject + useProjectStorage + useRuns hooks to show metadata, storage breakdown, and run history. AiSuggestionDetailPanel accepts { projectId, suggestionId } and delegates rendering to SuggestionDetail. Both live in frontend/src/components/layout/drawer-panels/ and are mounted by right-drawer.tsx via store fields drawerProjectId and drawerSuggestionId.

name: layout-header-height-standard
description: Page section headers and right drawer header both use h-14 px-6 border-b for consistent border-b alignment. Sidebar footer and bottom panel logs bar both use h-9 for border-t alignment. Never use py-4 for headers that must align with fixed-height sibling panels — use explicit h-14 instead.

name: settings-sticky-save-button
description: Moved Save Settings button out of SettingsForm into settings-page.tsx as fixed bottom bar (fixed bottom-0 right-0 w-full z-10 border-t shadow-md). Linked via form='settings-form' HTML attribute. Removed isSaving prop from SettingsForm. Added pb-20 to page container to prevent content occlusion. Retention cards outside form got space-y-6 wrapper for consistent gap.

name: flow-viz-tab-pattern
description: FlowVisualization uses absolute-positioned divs in a relative container for column cards with SVG overlay for connector lines. flattenToFlowColumns groups consecutive LayerNode children by structural fingerprint (type + child names) to detect repeated blocks. FlowColumn.isRepeated/repeatCount drive expand/collapse. Wired into weights-page.tsx reusing selectedLayerName state and LayerDetailDrawer.

name: activation-flow-mode
description: FlowVisualization accepts mode ('structural'|'activation'), activationSnapshot, onCaptureRequest, isCapturing, sampleInput props. Activation mode renders ActivationOverlay sub-component: same absolute-positioned column layout as structural, token rows derived from sampleInput.trim().split(/\s+/), per-column color via interpolateActivationColor (HSL 210→267 blue→purple), connector lines with activation-encoded strokeWidth [1.5,6] and opacity [0.2,0.9]. Mode toggle + ActivationSampleSelector + snapshot selector live in weights-page.tsx (not inside the component). capturedSnapshots state is shared between activations tab and flow tab; flowSnapshotIndex tracks selection for flow.

name: no-project-selected-component
description: NoProjectSelected shared component at frontend/src/components/shared/no-project-selected.tsx accepts pageTitle and description props, renders centered empty state with Link to '/' as CTA. Used by training, adapters, and weights pages when activeProjectId is null.

name: activeProjectId-persistence
description: app-store.ts partialize must include activeProjectId to persist project selection in localStorage. Without this, activeProjectId resets to null on page refresh, causing training/adapters/weights screens to show empty state.

name: architecture-tree-path-vs-named-modules
description: Frontend ArchitectureTree builds fullPath by prepending root class name (e.g. Qwen2ForCausalLM.lm_head), but PyTorch named_modules() keys omit root prefix (e.g. lm_head). Strip root prefix in weights-page.tsx before passing layerName to useLayerDetail.

name: yaml-endpoint-text-response
description: fetchActiveConfig chains two requests: first fetches active config version (no yaml_blob), then fetches yaml content via /{version_id}/yaml (PlainTextResponse, text/yaml). fetchApi always calls response.json() so fetchTextApi (uses response.text()) is needed for text/yaml responses. Both training and adapters pages depend on yamlBlob being populated.

name: yaml-snake-case-targetmodules-undefined
description: YAML config stores target_modules (snake_case) but AdaptersConfig type expects targetModules (camelCase). parseYaml() returns snake_case keys, so targetModules is undefined at runtime. Fix: normalize with ?? [] at state init in adapters-page.tsx and add ?? [] guards in child components.

name: runs-page-start-run-pattern
description: Runs page uses useActiveConfig + useCreateRun to allow launching runs directly. canStartRun = Boolean(activeConfig) && !activeRun. Start Run button in header always visible; also shown in RunList empty state via onStartRun prop. RunList accepts onStartRun?, isStartingRun?, canStartRun? optional props.

name: flow-detail-node-hierarchy
description: FlowNode has depth (nesting level within column) and isGroupHeader (true for intermediate nodes with children). flattenToFlowColumns recursively expands single non-repeated intermediates into separate columns; repeated groups produce one representative column with collectColumnNodes gathering all descendants (group headers + leaves). FlowNodeRow renders group headers at 24px with indent/muted style, leaves at 32px with depth*12px left padding. Activation mode filters isGroupHeader nodes when computing column means.

name: presets-panel-pattern
description: Preset panels are pure components (aside, w-60 shrink-0) placed to the right of the main form via flex gap-8 items-start. Training panel: onApply(Partial<TrainingConfig>). Adapters panel: onApply(AdaptersPresetValues) grouping adapters+optimization+quantization partials. Presets are hardcoded ReadonlyArray. Panel renders only when local state is non-null.

name: flow-canvas-pan-approach
description: FlowVisualization uses transform-based freeform pan canvas (no overflow-x-auto). StructuralCanvas and ActivationCanvas components hold panOffset state + isPanningRef, with window mousemove/mouseup listeners cleaned up in useEffect. ResizeObserver tracks container width to compute colsPerRow for grid layout. Columns positioned in rows using absolute positioning with CANVAS_PADDING=COLUMN_GAP=48px gutter for row-wrap arrows. SVG arrows use column-specific y-centers not a global centerY. Same-row: S-curve bezier. Row-wrap: U-turn elbow path through right/left gutters.

name: copy-for-ai-button-pattern
description:
CopyForAI shared component at components/shared/copy-for-ai.tsx accepts { buildPrompt: () => string, disabled?: boolean }. ClipboardCopy/Check icons from lucide-react, ghost icon button (h-7 w-7), isCopied state resets after 1500ms. Prompt builders in lib/ai-copy-prompts.ts as pure functions returning '[SYSTEM PROMPT]
...

[CONTEXT]
{json}' strings. capTreeDepth helper truncates LayerNode trees to N levels.
